description: A machine-only mesh for distributing tasks across multiple agents with deterministic routing.

task_packet.description: The task to be delegated, including metadata and constraints.

agent_registry.description: List of available agents with capabilities and load.

routing_rules.description: Deterministic rules for selecting the correct agent.

workflow.action: System evaluates all agents based on capabilities, load, and routing rules.
The best-fit agent is selected deterministically.
Task packet is forwarded to the selected agent.
Mesh returns a machine-readable confirmation of delegation.
